metadata.subject: Arts Education
metadata.description: Advanced students develop sophisticated personal artistic practice through sustained exploration of mixed media and conceptual approaches. This course emphasizes professional-level practice, artistic maturity, and preparation for art careers or advanced study.
metadata.general_description: Advanced art studio course for professional-level personal artistic practice.

big_ideas.statement: Advanced artists develop distinctive artistic voices expressing personal vision and perspectives.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 artists create professional-level work reflecting deep personal exploration and sophisticated artistic development.

big_ideas.statement: Mature artistic practice integrates technical skill, conceptual sophistication, and cultural awareness.
big_ideas.elaboration: Advanced artists combine diverse approaches, materials, and ideas into cohesive bodies of work with clear artistic intention.

big_ideas.statement: Professional artistic practice engages with meaningful themes and contributes to artistic discourse.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 artists create work exploring complex ideas, addressing contemporary concerns, and participating in art world conversations.

big_ideas.statement: Advanced artistic practice positions students for art careers or advanced study in visual arts.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 artists develop professional portfolios, exhibition experience, and networks necessary for art careers or continued education.

competencies.raw: Create substantial artistic bodies of work
i_can_statements: I can develop significant bodies of work with artistic coherence
I can explore complex themes and ideas systematically
I can sustain artistic practice over time
I can produce work meeting professional exhibition standards

competencies.raw: Develop sophisticated artistic concepts and meanings
i_can_statements: I can develop complex and layered artistic concepts
I can create work with intellectual and emotional depth
I can explore meaningful themes authentically
I can create work engaging with contemporary issues

competencies.raw: Master mixed media and diverse artistic approaches
i_can_statements: I can work across multiple media with sophistication
I can combine approaches creatively and intentionally
I can achieve technical excellence across media
I can innovate with materials and techniques
I can express personal perspective and vision
I can develop recognizable artistic approach
I can create work reflecting authentic self-expression
I can evolve artistic voice continuously
I can conduct sophisticated analysis of artistic work
I can understand art within art historical and cultural contexts
I can recognize artistic significance and innovation
I can evaluate work against professional standards

competencies.raw: Understand professional art practice and industry
i_can_statements: I can articulate professional standards in visual arts
I can understand art world, galleries, and institutions
I can recognize excellence in contemporary art
I can evaluate professional artistic practice

competencies.raw: Reflect on artistic maturity and professional readiness
i_can_statements: I can evaluate my artistic growth and sophistication
I can articulate my artistic philosophy and vision
I can identify my unique artistic contribution
I can assess readiness for art career or advanced study

competencies.raw: Engage with art's cultural and social dimensions
i_can_statements: I can analyze art's cultural and social significance
I can understand diverse artistic perspectives globally
I can recognize representation and marginalization in art
I can understand art's role in society and change
I can photograph artwork professionally
I can prepare work for exhibition and publication
I can create portfolio of work
I can maintain professional documentation

competencies.raw: Share artwork through exhibitions and public platforms
i_can_statements: I can exhibit work professionally
I can present work in various public contexts
I can engage audiences with my artistic work
I can participate in curatorial and exhibition processes

competencies.raw: Articulate artistic vision and conceptual intent
i_can_statements: I can explain artistic concepts compellingly
I can write sophisticated artist statements
I can discuss work thoughtfully with diverse audiences
I can develop artistic narrative

competencies.raw: Communicate through visual art and artistic expression
i_can_statements: I can express complex ideas through visual art
I can create work engaging audiences meaningfully
I can use art for personal and social expression
I can develop distinctive artistic voice

competencies.raw: Engage with diverse artistic traditions and global art
i_can_statements: I can study art from diverse cultures and traditions
I can appreciate global artistic perspectives
I can incorporate diverse influences respectfully
I can understand art as universal human expression

competencies.raw: Explore contemporary and innovative artistic practice
i_can_statements: I can engage with cutting-edge contemporary art
I can experiment with emerging approaches and technologies
I can participate in artistic innovation
I can develop work at frontier of visual arts practice

competencies.raw: Develop professional networks and art world engagement
i_can_statements: I can build networks in art communities
I can establish presence through exhibitions and shows
I can seek mentorship from established artists
I can participate in artist collectives and initiatives

competencies.raw: Plan trajectory toward professional art career or advanced study
i_can_statements: I can identify career goals in visual arts
I can explore pathways to art education or professional practice
I can develop plan for advanced study or career
I can commit to lifelong artistic practice and growth

areas.name: Advanced Personal Artistic Practice
topics: Development of substantial artistic bodies of work
Artistic coherence and vision across works

areas.name: Conceptual and Intellectual Development
topics: Cultural and social themes in art
Narrative and storytelling in visual art

areas.name: Advanced Mixed Media and Material Mastery
areas.raw: Advanced Mixed Media and Material Mastery

areas.name: Professional Art Practice and Career Development
areas.raw: Professional Art Practice and Career Development
topics: Building sustainable artistic practice and career
